title: Importing Date AND Time in Excel from Date Column
excerpt:
When I import my excel file with my dates with a start time, only the date imports and the start times are lost and I have to re-enter them. Is there a way to import them together? 
Date in Excel

posts.cookedHtml:
When I import my excel file with my dates with a start time, only the date imports and the start times are lost and I have to re-enter them. Is there a way to import them together?

Import into Monday

posts.author: SarahJacobs (Sarah Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Aholk

What format do you use to import dates? I haven’t been able to do that yet!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @aholk and @SarahJacobs,

You can now import date and time using the Toolkit app. In the app, you can choose both the date and time format

posts.author: SarahJacobs (Sarah Jacobs)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion kolaai, but I’m not going to pay for an app when monday should have this functionality already included
